original_semantics: Root ip inclusive, op exclusive, fr converts frames to seconds.
required_validation: Unit tests for op exclusivity and source frame selection.

original_semantics: Root composition defines viewport and clips to w x h.
purelottie_import: Root layer bounds and masksToBounds set.
required_validation: Pixel test with content outside bounds.

original_semantics: Lottie lists top layer first; compositor draws bottom to top.
Layer visible when ip <= frame < op.
required_validation: Boundary tests at ip, op - 1, op.

original_semantics: hd hides normal rendering but hidden layers can contribute as parents or mattes.
purelottie_import: Hidden layers skipped before parent/matte use.
required_validation: Parent and matte fixtures where hidden source is semantically active.

original_semantics: Child CTM = CTM(parent) * Transform(child), transitively.
purelottie_import: Wraps child in parent holder layers.
required_validation: Matrix oracle tests for parent chains.

original_semantics: Apply -anchor, scale, skew, rotation, position.
purelottie_import: Anchor point plus position/scale/rotation animations; skew missing.

original_semantics: sk and sa skew around axis between scale and rotation.
corpus_evidence: 136 layer sk; 137 layer sa; 23555 shape sk/sa
purelottie_import: Not reported because model drops it.
required_validation: Model fields, ImportReport rule, transform matrix tests.

original_semantics: rx/ry/rz/or produce 3D orientation.
purelottie_import: Not reported because model drops it.

original_semantics: ao rotates layer along motion path tangent.
bm maps to CSS compositing blend modes.
corpus_evidence: 14621 layer bm plus shape bm keys

original_semantics: ty 1 solid rectangle with sw/sh/sc.
purelottie_import: Creates Layer with bounds and backgroundColor.

original_semantics: ty 3 transform carrier without pixels.
ty 0 instantiates asset layers with local timing/stretch/remap.
purelottie_import: Builds asset layers; reports non-1 stretch; no time remap.

original_semantics: sr changes local time t prime = t / sr - st.
purelottie_import: Reports stretch when not 1 but renders unstretched.
required_validation: Expected report and no silent render claim.

original_semantics: tm remaps local time in seconds.
purelottie_import: Not reported because model drops it.

original_semantics: Selected source-frame traversal exposes composition, layer, group, style, modifier, matte, precomp, semantic decision, evaluated value, and render node state before rendering.
purelottie_model: LottieCompositionVM runs independently of PureLayer with explicit instructions, frame clock, stacks, JSON paths, source ranges when available, diagnostics, checkpoints, and deterministic render node ids.
purelottie_import: Not a backend lowering step; emits trace records and placeholder render nodes for future RenderIR/PureLayer lowering.
target: Future RenderIR and IDE debugger stepping
required_validation: Swift Testing coverage for readable debug traces, fast traces, JSON paths, modifiers, masks, precomps, skipped layers, render ids, and checkpoints.

original_semantics: ty 2 references image asset.
purelottie_model: Type known; image asset payload not modeled.

original_semantics: ty 5 text document and animators.
purelottie_model: Type known; text payload not modeled.

original_semantics: Masks combine layer content by mode, opacity, inversion, and path.
purelottie_import: Supports one non-inverted additive mask; reports others/approximations.
required_validation: Per-mode fixtures and animated mask tests.

original_semantics: tt/tp/td connect matte layer to target.
Shape arrays are scoped programs; styles/modifiers apply to preceding shapes.
purelottie_model: Item arrays preserved; LottieShapeProgram exposes style runs and geometry fragments.
purelottie_import: Semantic program preserves reverse walk; DrawingProgram lowers it to PureLayer.
required_validation: Semantic program and DrawingProgram golden tests against lottie-web examples.

original_semantics: Groups scope transforms/styles/modifiers; opacity is atomic.
purelottie_model: items decoded; LottieShapeProgram keeps group boundary, transform, opacity, and compositing mode.
purelottie_import: Recurses; static opacity transparency layer; animated opacity reported.

original_semantics: Shape transform affects geometry and style transforms; skew supported by spec.
purelottie_import: Static baked into path; animated reported; multiple approximated.

original_semantics: sh Bezier vertices/tangents; animated paths morph at frame time.
purelottie_import: Static initial lowered; path morph reported.

original_semantics: rc centered rectangle with roundness/direction.
el centered ellipse; direction matters for trim stroke order.
sr star/polygon geometry.
required_validation: Model and geometry oracle before lowering.

original_semantics: fl style color/opacity/fill rule applies to preceding shapes.
required_validation: Style-scope and animated color report tests.

original_semantics: st style color/opacity/width/caps/joins/miter/dash/blend.
purelottie_import: Static color/width lowered; animated style and PureLayer-missing caps/joins/miter/dash/blend reported.
required_validation: Cap/join/dash fixtures; PureLayer #157 before exact lowering.

original_semantics: gf linear/radial gradient fill.
required_validation: Gradient stop parser and reference tests.

original_semantics: gs gradient stroke.
tm modifies preceding paths by length with start/end/offset/mode.
purelottie_import: Stroke trim lowered; individual approximate; offset reported; fill trim reported.
required_validation: Length-based trim oracle and offset/fill fixtures.

original_semantics: mm boolean path operations.
rp clones preceding elements with transform/opacity interpolation.
rd rounds preceding path corners.
Keyframes use t/s/e/i/o/h and hold outside span.
Path keyframes interpolate vertices/tangents.
purelottie_import: Reports path morph and uses initial path.

original_semantics: slots substitute property values by sid.
lottie-web supports effects/expressions; security-sensitive.
Metadata usually safe; fonts/chars affect text rendering.
required_validation: Separate harmless metadata from rendering inputs.
